mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO yw_paper ( exam_id, member_id, title, content, course_id, total_score, qualify_score, time_limit, total_time, status ) SELECT e.id AS exam_id, #{param.memberId} AS member_id,
e.title, e.content, #{param.courseId} as course_id, e.total_score, e.qualify_score, e.time_limit, e.total_time, '1' FROM yw_exam e WHERE e.id = #{param.examId}
